p.strong: Checksum covers ALL bytes EXCEPT CRC field itself

ul.li: Footer: 4 bytes (always) CRC32 Algorithm: go crc := crc32.ChecksumIEEE( buf[0 : len(buf)-4] )

g.text: Bit flip | Cosmic ray, failing RAM
Partial write | Power loss during write()

ol.li: Scan forward for next valid header
Continue processing Never halt broker on single corrupt entry

g.text: Offset + Timestamp + TopicLen + PayloadLen + Topic + Payload
